title: Spec / business
description: Business context of the client. Drives copy, tone of voice and many design decisions.

legal_name.description: Legal entity name (used in footer, contracts, invoices).

display_name.description: Brand name as shown on the site (often shorter than legal_name).

industry.description: Primary industry. Free string for V1; may be tightened to enum after first dozen real intakes.

founded_year.description: Year the business was founded. Used in About sections and longevity messaging.

size.description: Headcount band. micro=2-9, small=10-49, medium=50-249, large=250+.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes the business serves.

regions.description: Sub-national regions (e.g. "Praha", "Bavaria") if the business is regional.

remote_global.description: Set when the business serves clients globally without physical presence.

usp.description: Unique selling proposition. One or two sentences capturing what makes this business different.

examples_we_like.description: Sample phrasings the client likes (existing copy, competitor phrases, …).

examples_we_avoid.description: Phrasings or registers to avoid (corporate speak, slang, jargon, …).

person.description: Whose voice is speaking. "first-plural" ("my v Acme...") is common for B2B; "second-plural" addresses the reader ("vyřešíme...").

logo_path.description: Relative path to logo file under client-assets/.

rebrand_in_scope.description: If true, the project is allowed to redesign brand basics; if false, existing brand is locked.

existing_brand.description: What the client already has. Empty/false means greenfield.

notes.description: Why they matter — direct competitor, aspirational reference, design we like, etc.
